overview: AskSpark is a modern eLearning platform that helps students ask questions without fear, build confidence, and get real answers from teachers and AI — all in a safe, anonymous environment.
features: Real teacher + AI support for instant answers
Confidence score and XP progress tracking
Live class broadcast with in-class chat
Smart doubt search with video solutions
Role-based dashboards for students and teachers
Blog and Learning Hub with lectures and practice questions
